caption: A woman wearing a purple and white striped button-down shirt and large black over-ear headphones is centered in the scene. She is positioned in front of a light-colored wall with a window partially covered by light-green and blue curtains to her left and a neutral-toned surface behind her to the right. The on-screen text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom-left corner of each frame. As the sequence progresses, she engages in a conversation, shifting her facial expressions from a neutral, speaking pose to a wide smile, then momentarily closing her eyes while continuing to speak, and finally returning to a neutral expression with her mouth open. Her movements are focused on her face and head, while her position remains stationary throughout the clip.
